C:\\Users\\pasin\\.gemini\\antigravity\\.serviceRawFile:
service: express-serverless-lambda

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1
  stage: dev
  environment:
    DATABASE_URL: ${env:DATABASE_URL}
    JWT_SECRET: ${env:JWT_SECRET}
    NODE_ENV: ${env:NODE_ENV}

functions:
  api:
    handler: src/index.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /
          method: ANY
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: /{proxy+}
          method: ANY
          cors: true

plugins:
  - serverless-plugin-typescript
  - serverless-offline

custom:
  serverless-offline:
    httpPort: 3000
    websocketPort: 3001
    lambdaPort: 3002
